top_signals.title: Ukraine to use seized crypto from cybercrime group to buy war bonds
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's Asset Recovery and Management Agency (ARMA), which manages property seized in criminal proceedings, said more than $8.3 million in cryptocurrency had been transferred to its official digital wallet following a court order.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lagarde Says European Banking System More Resilient to Shocks
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde says Europe is becoming less vulnerable to outside shocks thanks to a better financial framework and progress on the green transition. She speaks during her institution’s annual retreat in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin put-call ratio hits 1-year high: Are bears preparing for drop to $55K?
top_signals.summary: Rising demand for put options and persistent ETF outflows highlight Bitcoin's weakness despite lower oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ETF IQ 6/29/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Laffer Tengler CEO & CIO Nancy Tengler, Gabelli Funds President & Co-CIO of Value Chris Marangi, Founders ETFs Portfolio Manager Michael Monaghan, and Securitize VP & Head of Issuer Growth Giang Bui. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan startup SolaNika to test tech for charging drones with lasers
Hackers now exploit critical Oracle E-Business flaw in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers have begun exploiting a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-46817) in the Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) financial application, according to threat intelligence company Defused. [...]
